title: Deliver minimal tooling parity
description: Implement the smallest supportable export / service tooling surface for this branch, and explicitly defer the rest with docs.
acceptance: Supported tooling entrypoints are discoverable in code and docs
Any implemented tooling path has a smoke or unit test
Hydra/export/WandB/Optuna/deploy scope is explicit rather than implied
review_focus: No dead-end CLI or placeholder interface presented as complete
No regression to current training entry behavior
